# Nixify: Add Nix Flake Support to a Project

> Category: **software-dev** · Status:  · Version: 2.7.0

Add Nix flake support to a project so it can be installed via nix run github:... or nix profile install github:.... Use when the user wants to make a project installable via Nix flakes from a remote GitHub repository, add devbox.json for reproducible development environments, or package a project for Nix profile installation. Covers forking, cloning, architecture analysis, flake template selection, documentation updates, CI setup, and PR creation.
